Video.summary: British sailor Edward falls in love with Manuela Cortez against her father's wishes.
Video.title: Ship of No Return

Video.summary: Jim Bridger returns from an Army assignment to learn his life at home has changed drastically.
Video.title: Old Gabe

Video.summary: A captain tries to clear a trading post owner accused of selling ammunition to the enemy.
Video.title: A Bullet for the Captain

Video.summary: Innocent John Studebaker's high hopes are quickly punctured when he loses his wagon and his savings.
Video.title: Wheelbarrow Johnny

Video.summary: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.
Video.title: The Blond King

Video.summary: As their crops dry out, desperate farmers seek help from the owner of a hydraulic mining machine.
Video.title: The Talking Wire

Video.summary: A Mexican official must decide between his fellow caballeros and his obligations to the U.S.
Video.title: Olvera

Video.summary: Rival communications companies vie for bonus money to build the first transcontinental telegraph.
Video.title: Hang 'Em High

Video.summary: The son of a Native chief faces trial after being accused of the murder of a fellow tribesman.
Video.title: Tribal Justice

Video.summary: Actor Edwin Booth faces discrimination due to his brother's assassination of President Lincoln.
Video.title: His Brother's Keeper

Video.summary: Entrepreneur Levi Strauss starts the world's first blue jean manufacturer.
Video.title: The Million Dollar Pants

Video.summary: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.
Video.title: Eagle in the Rocks

Video.summary: A Native chief's young widow fights an ancient ritual following her husband's death.
Video.title: Human Sacrifice

Video.summary: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.
Video.title: Somewhere in the Vultures

Video.summary: A woman saves her husband from outlaws.
Video.title: The Gentle Sword

Video.summary: Fighting corrupt lawmen and vigilantes.
Yvonne DeCarlo plays a doctor struggling to begin a medical practice as a woman in the 1890s.
Video.title: The Lady Was an M.D.

Video.summary: Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: A campaign to annex Oregon Territory.
Video.title: Who's Fer Divide?

Video.summary: A group of religious settlers tangles with outlaws who have set up an illegal tollgate.
Video.title: Dangerous Crossing

Video.summary: Lawyer William Thorne defends an innocent woman threatened by bigotry and mob violence.
Video.title: Death Ride

Video.summary: A con artist boasts he owns most of San Francisco, but a chemist aims to expose him.
Video.title: The Stolen City

Video.summary: A female patriot meets an outlaw.
Video.title: General Without a Cause

Video.summary: After their parents die, the Segar children leave their wagon train and head for Washington.
Video.title: Head of the House

Video.summary: A Navy officer mapping the Missouri River encounters a struggle between Indians and the Army.
Video.title: Sailor on a Horse

Video.summary: In the years after California's conquest, an Army commander grapples with hostile citizens.
Video.title: Goodbye Five Hundred Pesos

Video.summary: Montana's corrupt governor tries to reform his image.
Video.title: The General Who Disappeared

Video.summary: A vengeful sea captain goes after the sailors he holds responsible for the loss of his leg.
Video.title: Cap'n Pegleg

Video.summary: When a deadly illness breaks out among the Natives, Lt. Wood is willing to treat them, for a price.
Video.title: The White Healer

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: A settler must prove an inheritance.
Video.title: The Pieces of the Puzzle

Video.summary: Pike, an irritable trapper, uses his hot temper to save himself from a run-in with Dakota Indians.
Video.title: Tall Heart, Short Temper

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: Lumberjack Will is attracted to the spoiled daughter of his boss, Mr. Bell.
Video.title: The Taming of Trudy Bell

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: Two members of a wagon train try to reach help before their group dies of starvation.
Video.title: Out of the Valley of Death

Video.summary: An old thief outwits lawmen by returning to his rundown shack on the U.S.-Republic of Texas border.
Video.title: Old Stape

Video.summary: After a trip to town, two miners find gold nuggets mixed with beans they bought.
Video.title: The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

The Great Pinto Bean Gold Hunt

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull
